title: Alien Body Music
name: Alien Body Music
body:
Independent record label operated by Travis Egedy (Pictureplane). Released *Degenerate* (September 2018), which contains the track "Color Spectrum (Tokyo Drift)" — a direct tribute to Colin Ward.

## Known releases
- *Degenerate* by Pictureplane (September 2018) — includes "Color Spectrum (Tokyo Drift) feat. smrtdeath," dedicated to Colin Ward

## Sources
- [Westword — Pictureplane Rhinoceropolis tribute](https://www.westword.com/music/pictureplanes-travis-egedy-remembers-rhinoceropolis-and-colin-ward-in-new-music-video-11031024)
